zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Vergy於1182年出生在法國布格o-達雷勒-維吉時，她的父親Hugues de Vergy41歲，母親Gillette de Trainel28歲。她於1199年與Eudes III duc de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年3月3日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達普雷諾斯享年70歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Vergy于1182年出生在法国布格o-達雷勒-維吉时，她的父亲Hugues de Vergy41岁，母亲Gillette de Trainel28岁。她于1199年与Eudes III duc de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年3月3日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達普雷諾斯享年70岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Herefordshire): nickname from Middle English verrei, verie ‘true; reliable, trustworthy’ (Old French verai).

Irish: variant of McVerry, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fearadhaigh, itself an unlenited and subsequently voiced variant of Mac Fhearadhaigh, ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’. Compare McAree and McCary ; also the surnames Ferry and Farry , from Ó Fearadhaigh.
History: The widow Bridget Very settled with her children in Salem, MA, c. 1634. She had many prominent descendants, including the poet Jones Very (1813–1880).

variants.name: McAree
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhearadhaigh ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’ (from fear ‘man’). Pronunciation of this name as McAree led to misinterpretation as Mac an Rí ‘son of the king’ and thus to ‘translation’ as King . See McGarry .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Vergy was born in 1182, in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Hugues de Vergy, was 41 and her mother, Gillette de Trainel, was 28. She married Eudes III duc de Bourgogne in 1199. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 March 1252, in Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Vergy est née en 1182, à Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues de Vergy, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Gillette de Trainel, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes III duc de Bourgogne en 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1252, à Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Vergy 1182 in Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Vergy 41 und ihre Mutter Gillette de Trainel 28. Sie hat 1199 Eudes III duc de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. März 1252 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Vergy è nata il nel 1182 nel Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Hugues de Vergy, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Gillette de Trainel, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Eudes III duc de Bourgogne nel 1199. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1252, nel Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Vergyが1182年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルレウレ-バーグイで生まれた時，父Hugues de Vergyは41歳，母Gillette de Trainelは28歳であった。1199年にEudes III duc de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年3月3日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルプレノイスで70歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Vergy(이)가 1182년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 레우레-버기에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Vergy(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gillette de Trainel(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1199년 Eudes III duc de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 3월 3일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 프렌이스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Vergy nasceu em 1182, em Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues de Vergy, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Gillette de Trainel, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes III duc de Bourgogne em 1199. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1252, em Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Vergy родилась в 1182 г. в местности реулле-вирги, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Vergy было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Gillette de Trainel, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes III duc de Bourgogne в 1199 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 марта 1252 г. в местности преноис, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

sm.1199–1218: mai le 1199 e o'o I le 1218

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Vergy nació en 1182, en Reulle-Vergy, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Vergy, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Gillette de Trainel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eudes III duc de Bourgogne en 1199. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1252, en Prenois, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
